title: resplit, match, and link ftPp_SpecialS.c
author: lukechampine
body: please forgive this hideous hack. If there's a better way to align the floats, I'm all ears!
diff_hunk:
@@ -0,0 +1,932 @@
+
+

+#include "lb/lbvector.h"
+#include "pl/player.h"
+
+#include <math.h>
+#include <trigf.h>
+
+static float sdata2_ordering(void)
+{
+    float data_0 = 0.0f;
+    double data_1 = 0.5;
+    double data_2 = 3.0;
+    float data_3 = 3.0f;
+    float data_4 = 5.0f;
+    float data_5 = 1.0f;
+    float data_6 = -1.0f;
+    double data_7 = 0.5;
+    return data_7 + data_6 + data_5 + data_4 + data_3 + data_2 + data_1 +
+           data_0;
+}
